query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IS NOT NULL AND openingName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as classified, SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IS NULL OR openingName = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unclassified FROM puzzles
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IS NOT NULL AND openingName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as classified, SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IS NULL OR openingName = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unclassified FROM puzzles
